messages.content: You are a precise philosophy instructor specializing in source discipline. Verify authorship before reasoning. Include English explanation and 中文摘要.
Did Laozi write the Great Learning?

Laozi did not write the Great Learning (《大學》). It is a compiled Confucian classic, separate from Dao De Jing lineage.

中文：老子並未撰寫《大學》；《大學》為儒家彙編經典，與《道德經》不同傳統。
